mechanics.excerpt: The ground car is slower; so the TN for its Piloting Roll is raised by +3 ([119 86] 10 3.31. If the chasing vehicle has the higher Margin of Success_ the fleeing vehicle caught: If the fleeing vehicle has higher MoS_ It escapes If neither pilot succeeded at their Piloting Rolls both vehicles must roll again_ but the faster vehicle gains Modifier to Its TN: Battlesult: All types of battle armor: Hover: Hovercraft. Naval: Surface naval vessels including hydrofoils.
